src: Multi-Model Chat — Compare responses from multiple AI models side by side in real-time. Supports GPT, Claude, Mistral, and local models (Ollama). Built with React, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS.
ja: Multi-Model Chat — 複数のAIモデルのレスポンスをリアルタイムで並べて比較。GPT、Claude、Mistral、ローカルモデル（Ollama）に対応。React、TypeScript、Tailwind CSS製。
